heading: Omitted
label: 1195 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for certain moneys withheld from per capita distribution to be invested or placed in trust and for the income thereon to be used for the education of members of the tribe, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 91–259, § 584 Stat. 254May 21, 1970
